title: eurya amplexifolia
intro: Eurya amplexifolia, also known as the Chinese velvet star or velvet star, is a plant species in the family Pentaphyllaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eurya amplexifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve cardiovascular health. Eurya amplexifolia is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, or as a dried extract for herbal supplements.
